channel.title: Tvbox on Margrop Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Tvbox on Margrop Blog

item.title: [Transfer] How to set up xiaoya’s docker and tvbox configuration
item.description: Article source: https://xiaoyaliu.notion.site/xiaoya-docker-69404af849504fa5bcf9f2dd5ecaa75f How to set up xiaoya’s docker To get the latest information about Xiaoya, please follow Xiaoya’s tg channel https://t.me/xiaoyaliu If you have any difficulties in using it, you can come here to find me or others for help https://t.me/PlutoPlayer Table of contents What do you need to install xiaoya’s docker The soft routing box is similar to n1, etc., with openwrt environment (can be configured with one click on the terminal) NAS and other devices have docker plug-ins (it is impossible or difficult to log in to the terminal and requires graphical self-configuration) Cloud servers are also commonly known as vps (can be configured with one click on the terminal) How to install Install under openwrt or vps, call up the terminal command line The left side of the openwrt control panel (find “TTY Terminal” under “System” or “Services”)

item.title: TVBOX long-term maintenance apk download address and interface
item.description: #TVBOX download address Download:https://www.lanzoul.com/iANk409bj7fc Password: 5q1m The following interfaces are from Fat Cat Collection (Fat Cat official website) #fatcat​ The rice is too hard #云星 #artifact #lenice qiaoer #junge #小雅

item.title: TV Box TVBox takagen version 99, v20230307_2315 (with the latest interface address)
item.description: Open source, free, self-configured interface, used for both live broadcast and on-demand, Android devices. The takagen99 version has a new UI appearance and richer functions. It supports mounting WebDav and local disks, player display resolution, network speed, time screen display and other functions. 2. TVbox usage tutorial Click “Settings” on the homepage, select “Configure Address”, enter the “Data Source Address”, enable storage permissions, select the data source after “OK”, and then you can use it.
